selection.description: One selection entry: either point or interval.

point_selection.description: Click-based selection that captures one or many discrete marks.

fields.description: Fields whose values define selection identity.

encodings.description: Encoding channels whose bound fields drive the selection.

toggle.description: Whether shift-click toggles membership; expression allowed.

empty.description: Behavior when no marks are selected.

interval_selection.description: Drag-based selection that captures a continuous range over one or more channels.

encodings.description: Channels to brush over. Position channels (x | y | x2 | y2 | theta) are enforced semantically via PRISM_SPEC_020 — schema accepts any string so the semantic layer can render a useful fixup.

mark.description: Visual properties of the brush rectangle.

translate.description: Whether the brush can be translated.

zoom.description: Whether the brush can be zoomed.
